en: Nice style. Shame I wear it better.
pl: Niezły styl. Szkoda, że na mnie leży lepiej.

en: This is confusing. I vote we fight.
pl: To jest mylące. Głosuję za walką.

en: I was about to say the same!
Mmm, I see... #2.00 immortality sure is nice, but... #4.30 a true hero must make the greatest sacrifice #7.20 to gain ultimate virtue. #9.50 For honor!

en: Dying wasn't something I was ever good at. #2.50 But thanks for the warning!

en: I don't believe in death. #1.50 Never happened to me.

en: Master! #1.20 You grace your faithful servant with your presence, hehe! #5.00 Want to inspect the teleporters?

en: No. #0.60 Just enjoying some time off work.

en: Hey! #0.90 I still need to wash my hands!
You think I'm locked in this tower with you? #2.80 You're locked in here with me!
pl: Myślisz, że jestem zamknięty w tej wieży z tobą? #2.80 To ty jesteś tu zamknięty ze mną!

en: Sometimes it feels like #1.40 I spend more time here than at home.

en: Ugh, I'm never gonna drink again! #3.20 Except for big holidays. #5.00 And when invited. #6.50 And - well... #7.50 There will be exceptions.
pl: Ugh, nigdy więcej nie piję! #3.20 Poza wielkimi świętami. #5.00 I gdy mnie zaproszą. #6.50 I - no cóż... #7.50 Będą wyjątki.

en: I should really stop completely undressing #2.80 before going to the bathroom.

en: Sigh… #1.20 I wish Dr. Lockengold was here…. #3.50 He’d know exactly what to do

Myślałem, że ta dźwignia spuszcza wodę...

en: Wow! #0.90 A toilet that turns into a tower. #3.00 So cutting edge!
pl: Wow! #0.90 Toaleta, która zmienia się w wieżę. #3.00 Ale nowoczesność!

en: Out of the smell. #1.20 Into the stench!
I'm going to take #1.00 two stars off of my review #3.00 due to the bathroom experience!
pl: Odejmę #1.00 dwie gwiazdki w recenzji #3.00 za doświadczenie łazienkowe!

en: I think my nostril hairs have switched places.

en: Where did this underwear come from? #2.30 I always go commando!
pl: Skąd się wzięła ta bielizna? #2.30 Ja zawsze chodzę bez!

en: You know what farmers do best? #2.00 They reap.
pl: Wiesz, co rolnicy robią najlepiej? #2.00 Zbierają plony.

Wow. #0.80 You really couldn't wait to show off... #2.80 Huh?

en: Buy cheap and you'll buy twice, they say.
